name: Honey Hole Winery
tagline: Family-made wine, mead, and slushies in the Poconos — since 1996.
seoDescription: Honey Hole Winery — family-owned in Drums, PA since 1996. 40+ wines and meads, wine slushies, food trucks, and pet-friendly outdoor seating in the Poconos.

hero.heading: Forty wines, one family, zero pretense.
hero.subheading: A family-owned winery and tasting bar in Drums, PA — pouring 40-plus wines and meads, wine slushies, and a pet-friendly patio in the heart of the Poconos since 1996.

images.heroAlt: Honey Hole Winery tasting bar in Drums, PA
images.storyAlt: Honey Hole Winery patio and vines

about.heading: A Poconos family winery since 1996
body: John and Patricia Weimer planted Honey Hole's first vines in 1997 and poured their first signature blends in 1999 — and they've spent their lives since perfecting the craft. What started as a labor of love is now one of the friendliest tasting bars in the Poconos.

Today you'll find more than forty wines and meads on the list, from light and sweet to bold and dry, plus our famous wine slushies. Bring the dog, grab a seat on the patio, catch a food truck, and stay a while — that's the whole idea.

services.title: 40+ wines & meads
services.description: From light and sweet to bold and dry — plus traditional meads — all made and bottled right here.

services.title: Wine slushies
services.description: Our warm-weather favorite, and the reason a lot of folks first find us.

services.title: Tastings & tasting bar
services.description: Pull up to the bar and work your way through the list with people who love to talk wine.

services.title: Patio, pups & food trucks
services.description: Pet-friendly outdoor seating with rotating food trucks and local honey and treats to take home.

hoursNote: Outdoor seating opens up in the warmer months — check our Facebook for food-truck nights.
